nasb.text: Bread obtained by falsehood is sweet to a man, But afterward his mouth will be filled with gravel.

esv.text: Bread gained by deceit is sweet to a man, but afterward his mouth will be full of gravel.

cnv.text: 欺騙得來的食物，人總覺得甘甜； 事後他的口必充滿沙石。

ccb.text: 骗来的饼觉得香甜， 最后却是满口泥沙。

csbs.text: 诡诈得来的食物，人觉得甜美； 但后来他的口必充满沙石。
